summary: During the Select Board Work Session on June 16, 2026, the board discussed various topics, including the postponement of agenda item 1B for further discussion [01:26]. They reviewed the minutes from the previous meeting and registered multiple committee vacancies, notably in the Disability Commission [17:40]. There was discourse on the need for a new advisory committee to enhance civic engagement and public input in decision-making [198:15]. Additionally, the board addressed funding concerns related to the affordable housing trust fund and the potential unencumbering of $3.75 million [115:55]. The session included a focus on infrastructure needs across various departments and collaboration between the town's boards and residents for future zoning and development projects. The meeting ultimately concluded without any formal votes being recorded.
title: Select Board Work Session - June 16, 2026
